title: Recursion & Backtracking
description: Understand recursive functions, stack frames, call overhead, and backtracking search strategies.
learningObjectives: Identify call stack frame mechanics in recursive methods
Design proper base cases to prevent Stack Overflow crashes
Implement backtracking strategies for finding paths or solving puzzles

sections.title: Stack Frames and Base Cases
sections.content: Recursion occurs when a function calls itself. Each nested call allocates a new stack frame storing arguments and local registers. If a base case (stopping condition) is missing or call depth is too large, the stack memory limits will exceed, triggering a crash (Stack Overflow). Backtracking is a refinement of recursion that aborts branches early if they violate game rules (like maze traversal).

sections.title: Solving Fibonacci via Recursion
